utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Wow ! Fortunately she has a very pretty face !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , I so can not believe this ! My uterus is an inhospitable environment ? I was trying so hard to be a good hostess !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , I can not believe my sperm have low motility because , let me tell you , when I was growing up they sure seem to be in a hurry to get places !

utterances.speaker: Doctor Connelly
utterances.text: I am sorry there was not better news from your test last week but I wanted to talk to you about your options .

utterances.speaker: Doctor Connelly
utterances.text: Well , first of all , even though your chances of conceiving through natural means are not great , you never know !

utterances.speaker: Doctor Connelly
utterances.text: So , keep having sex on a regular basis .

emotion_cause.span: 10_keep having sex on a regular basis .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Do not worry , after a while he will tune it out .

utterances.speaker: Doctor Connelly
utterances.text: Ok , given your situation , the options with the greatest chances for success would be surrogacy , or insemination using a sperm donor .
